message:
feat(fp-io): add read_csv quote/escape option parity (frankenpandas-oukm)

Adds CsvReadOptions.quotechar / escapechar / doublequote covering
pandas' pd.read_csv(quotechar, escapechar, doublequote) surface.
Wired through csv::ReaderBuilder's .quote / .escape / .double_quote
so callers can read CSVs that use `'` as the quote character, or
backslash-escaped quotes (`doublequote=false, escapechar=b'\\'`)
instead of the default RFC 4180 double-quote style. Defaults
preserve current behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
